description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on a scheduled cron job. The workflow has four jobs: macos_catalina on macOS 10.15, ros_foxy on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container, ubuntu_focal on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container, and ubuntu_focal_apt on ubuntu-latest with a ubuntu:focal container. Each job checks out the repository and runs custom setup and build_test scripts in different shells.
